mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(BOARD_ID) FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND BOARD_TYPE = 'G'
AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('T', 'S')
AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('G', 'T', 'S')

SELECT "title", "moveUrl", "viewCount", "likeCount", "replyCnt" FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT TITLE AS "title", '/community/view?board_id=' || BOARD_ID AS "moveUrl", VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", LIKE_COUNT AS "likeCount", REPLY_CNT AS "replyCnt" FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND BOARD_TYPE = 'G'
AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('T', 'S')
AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('G', 'T', 'S')
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC ) a
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(BOARD_ID) FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND (IS_SELECTED = 'N' OR IS_SELECTED IS NULL)
AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y'

SELECT "title", "moveUrl", "viewCount", "likeCount", "replyCnt" FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT TITLE AS "title", '/qna/detail?qna_id=' || BOARD_ID AS "moveUrl", VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", LIKE_COUNT AS "likeCount", REPLY_CNT AS "replyCnt" FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_TYPE = 'Q' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND (IS_SELECTED = 'N' OR IS_SELECTED IS NULL)
AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y'
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC ) a
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(BOARD_ID) FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y'

SELECT "title", "moveUrl", "viewCount", "likeCount", "replyCnt" FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT TITLE AS "title", '/qna/detail?qna_id=' || PARENT_ID AS "moveUrl", VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", LIKE_COUNT AS "likeCount", REPLY_CNT AS "replyCnt" FROM tbl_board WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND IS_SELECTED = 'Y'
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC ) a
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(r.REPLY_ID) FROM tbl_reply r JOIN tbl_board b ON r.BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND b.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND b.BOARD_TYPE IN ('G', 'T', 'S')
AND b.BOARD_TYPE IN ('Q', 'A')

SELECT "content", "reg_date" FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT r.CONTENT AS "content", -- JS에서 보여주기 좋게 날짜 포맷팅을 DB 단에서 처리 TO_CHAR(r.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "reg_date" FROM tbl_reply r JOIN tbl_board b ON r.BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND b.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND b.BOARD_TYPE IN ('G', 'T', 'S')
AND b.BOARD_TYPE IN ('Q', 'A')
ORDER BY r.REG_DATE DESC ) a
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_USER
name = #{name},
brith_date = #{brith_date},
nickname = #{nickname},
address = #{address},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select: SELECT hashtag_id, hashtag_name FROM tbl_hashtag_list WHERE hashtag_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY hashtag_name
mapper.update: MERGE INTO tbl_user_aspect t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, #{hashtagId} AS hashtag_id FROM dual) s ON (t.user_id = s.user_id AND t.hashtag_id = s.hashtag_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, hashtag_id) VALUES (s.user_id, s.hashtag_id)
mapper.select: SELECT profile_filename FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
